commits.message: ─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Update README with problem/approach/outcome narrative    2 │    3 │ - Add clear hero section: The Problem → The Approach → The Outcome    4 │ - Add badges for corpus size (46 texts) and language support (15+)    5 │ - Update roadmap to reflect actual completions:    6 │   - 6 analysis modules (added translation)    7 │   - 46 texts corpus with 115 files, 1.4M+ lines    8 │   - Original languages: Greek, Hebrew, Russian, Chinese, Sanskrit, Persian, Japanese, Arabic    9 │   - Multiple PD translations per text (2-5 per major work)   10 │ - Add planned: Real-time collaborative analysis   11 │   12 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add coverage tests for 6 low-coverage modules (89% → 91%)    2 │    3 │ Add 236 targeted tests to improve coverage of previously undertested modules:    4 │    5 │ - depth_tracker.py: 75% → 100% (36 tests)    6 │   - ABSOLUTE/EMERGENCY limit handling    7 │   - PanicStop and DepthLimitExceeded exceptions    8 │   - Tag precedence for limit determination    9 │   - Depth status calculations and at_risk boundaries   10 │   11 │ - validator.py: 71% → 99% (43 tests)   12 │   - Multiple simultaneous validation errors   13 │   - Exception type specificity (OrganNotFoundError, InvalidModeError)   14 │   - Case sensitivity handling   15 │   - InvocationLogger truncation and filtering   16 │   17 │ - enforcement.py: 73% → 98% (43 tests)   18 │   - LAW_01 isolation, LAW_04 stagnation, LAW_81 fusion violations   19 │   - Tier boundary values (25, 50, 70, 85)   20 │   - Law activation/deactivation idempotency   21 │   - Consequence application with unknown law_id   22 │   23 │ - patchbay.py: 75% → 96% (37 tests)   24 │   - QueueOverflow exception handling   25 │   - Maintenance mode blocking   26 │   - Transitive deadlock detection   27 │   - Junction node creation with multiple patches   28 │   29 │ - mirror_cabinet.py: 75% → 95% (44 tests)   30 │   - All 5 grief stages and shadow archetypes   31 │   - Fusion eligibility with law suggestion   32 │   - Fragment overlap counting by charge and words   33 │   - Reclamation boundary at charge 86   34 │   35 │ - heart_of_canon.py: 70% → 94% (33 tests)   36 │   - High recurrence charge boost with cap at 100   37 │   - Canonization boundary conditions (68, 70, 71)   38 │   - Pulse check cache hit path   39 │   - Mythic weight saturation   40 │   - Blessing generation for all tiers   41 │   42 │ Test results: 897 tests passing, 91% coverage   43 │   44 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add remaining 5 organs (14, 15, 18, 20, 21) with full test coverage    2 │    3 │ Implements 5 new organ handlers to bring total to 21 of 22:    4 │    5 │ - Process Monetizer (Organ 14): Transforms creative process into sacred    6 │   product, ritual currency, and public offering. Handles monetization    7 │   eligibility, price calculation, format assignment, and pricing status.    8 │    9 │ - Audience Engine (Organ 15): Fan cultivation protocol and witness   10 │   engagement module. Manages audience tiers (Silent Echo, Orbital Witness,   11 │   Mirror Witness, Fragment-Holder), echo tracking, and parasocial risk   12 │   detection.   13 │   14 │ - Analog/Digital Engine (Organ 18): Threshold guardian between flesh and   15 │   function. Governs translation safety, format conversion tracking, loss   16 │   prediction, and sacred analog protection.   17 │   18 │ - Consumption Protocol (Organ 20): Governs ethical ingestion of outputs.   19 │   Handles ingestion risk evaluation, protective gating, consumption   20 │   archetype tracking, and echo distortion monitoring.   21 │   22 │ - Stagecraft Module (Organ 21): Performance engine for enacting rituals   23 │   in real-time. Manages character embodiment, loop performances, stage   24 │   elements, and collapse event tracking.   25 │   26 │ Test results: 661 tests passing, 89% coverage   27 │   28 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add 6 new organs and increase test coverage to 87%    2 │    3 │ Implement organs 12, 13, 16, 17, 19, 22 with comprehensive test suites,    4 │ bringing total registered organs from 10 to 16 and tests from 221 to 479.    5 │    6 │ New organs implemented:    7 │ - Place Protocols (16): Spatial context engine with 10 canonical zones    8 │   (HERE, THERE, NOWHERE, SOMEWHERE, BACKTHEN, NEVERW4S, MAIN_STREET,    9 │   MULHOLLAND_DRIVE, THE_ARCHIVE, THE_STAGE)   10 │ - Time Rules (17): Temporal recursion engine with bloom cycles   11 │   (DORMANT, SPROUTING, FLOWERING, SEEDING) and charge-based timing   12 │ - Chamber of Commerce (12): Symbolic economy with 3 currency types   13 │   (dreampoints, looptokens, mirrorcredits) and trade/mint operations   14 │ - Blockchain Economy (13): Immutable record system with hash-linked   15 │   blocks and smart ritual contracts   16 │ - Process→Product (19): Converts processes to shareable forms with   17 │   format selection and compression loss tracking   18 │ - Publishing Temple (22): Final publication gate with risk assessment,   19 │   metadata sealing, and scarcity settings   20 │   21 │ New test files (258 tests):   22 │ - test_place_protocols.py: 48 tests for spatial context engine   23 │ - test_time_rules.py: 44 tests for temporal recursion   24 │ - test_chamber_commerce.py: 38 tests for symbolic economy   25 │ - test_blockchain_economy.py: 35 tests for immutable records   26 │ - test_process_product.py: 42 tests for product conversion   27 │ - test_publishing_temple.py: 36 tests for publication workflow   28 │ - test_coverage_gaps.py: 66 tests for constants, exceptions, bloom_engine   29 │   30 │ Coverage improvements:   31 │ - constants.py: 62% → 100%   32 │ - exceptions.py: 57% → 100%   33 │ - bloom_engine.py: 57% → 89%   34 │ - Overall: 81% → 87%   35 │   36 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add comprehensive test coverage for RE:GE package    2 │    3 │ Increase test coverage from 46% to 81% by adding 163 new tests.    4 │    5 │ New test files:    6 │ - test_persistence.py: 51 tests for ArchiveManager, CheckpointManager, schemas    7 │ - test_cli.py: 27 tests for CLI commands (invoke, status, fragments, checkpoint, recover, repl)    8 │ - test_dispatcher.py: 26 tests for Dispatcher routing and depth handling    9 │ - test_organs_extended.py: 59 tests for extended organ coverage   10 │   11 │ Coverage improvements by module:   12 │ - CLI (cli.py): 0% → 80%   13 │ - Persistence (archive.py, checkpoint.py, schemas.py): 0% → 92-100%   14 │ - Dispatcher: 21% → 94%   15 │ - ArchiveOrder: 28% → 89%   16 │ - CodeForge: 34% → 91%   17 │ - DreamCouncil: 32% → 94%   18 │ - EchoShell: 30% → 86%   19 │ - MaskEngine: 30% → 86%   20 │ - MythicSenate: 31% → 83%   21 │ - RitualCourt: 34% → 86%   22 │   23 │ Total: 221 tests passing   24 │   25 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Reorganize repository following best practices    2 │    3 │ Structure changes:    4 │ - Create docs/ directory with subdirectories for organized documentation:    5 │   - docs/core/ - Core system files (4NTHOLOGY, constants, linkmap)    6 │   - docs/organs/ - All 22 organ specifications    7 │   - docs/protocols/ - Protocol specifications (FUSE01, recovery, collaborator)    8 │   - docs/interfaces/ - OS interface documentation    9 │   - docs/academic-wing/ - Academic expansion chambers (AAW_CORE 08-12)   10 │   - docs/archive/ - Historical/symbolic fragments   11 │   12 │ File naming fixes:   13 │ - Fix truncated filenames:   14 │   - ANALOG_DIGITAL_ENGIN → ANALOG_DIGITAL_ENGINE   15 │   - PROCESS_PRODUCT_CONV → PROCESS_PRODUCT_CONVERSION   16 │   - RITUAL_ACCESS_CO → RITUAL_ACCESS_CONTROLLER   17 │ - Standardize AAW_CORE naming (em-dash to underscores):   18 │   - "AAW_CORE_XX — NAME.md" → "RE-GE_AAW_CORE_XX_NAME.md"   19 │   20 │ New files:   21 │ - README.md - Project overview, installation, and usage guide   22 │ - LICENSE - MIT License   23 │ - CONTRIBUTING.md - Contribution guidelines   24 │ - .gitignore - Standard Python project ignores   25 │   26 │ Updates:   27 │ - CLAUDE.md - Updated with new directory structure and Python implementation details   28 │   29 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Implement RE:GE as executable Python package    2 │    3 │ Transform the RE:GE design specifications into a fully functional Python    4 │ application implementing the symbolic operating system.    5 │    6 │ Package structure (28 files):    7 │ - rege/core/: Constants (5-tier charge system), models, exceptions    8 │ - rege/parser/: Invocation parser and validator for ritual syntax    9 │ - rege/routing/: Soul Patchbay queue, dispatcher, depth tracker   10 │ - rege/organs/: 10 organ handlers (Heart of Canon, Mirror Cabinet, etc.)   11 │ - rege/protocols/: FUSE01 fusion, system recovery, law enforcement   12 │ - rege/persistence/: JSON archive manager and checkpoint system   13 │ - rege/cli.py: Command-line interface with invoke, status, checkpoint, repl   14 │   15 │ Key features implemented:   16 │ - 5-tier charge system (LATENT→CRITICAL) with priority routing   17 │ - Priority queue with collision detection and deadlock handling   18 │ - Recursion depth limits (7/12/21/33) with escalation behaviors   19 │ - Fragment fusion protocol with rollback capability   20 │ - System recovery with checkpoints and emergency stop   21 │ - Law enforcement with violation detection and consequences   22 │   23 │ Test suite: 58 tests covering parser, routing, organs, and protocols   24 │   25 │ CLI usage:   26 │   rege invoke '::CALL_ORGAN MIRROR_CABINET ...'   27 │   rege status   28 │   rege checkpoint create "name"   29 │   rege repl   30 │   31 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Implement RE:GE system enhancements from evaluation-to-growth analysis    2 │    3 │ 8 workstreams implemented addressing HIGH, MEDIUM, and LOW priority issues:    4 │    5 │ Workstream E (Foundational):    6 │ - Create unified 5-tier charge threshold system (LATENT/PROCESSING/ACTIVE/INTENSE/CRITICAL)    7 │ - Update 12 organ files with consistent tier references    8 │    9 │ Workstream B (Queue System):   10 │ - Add priority-based queue to SOUL_PATCHBAY with collision detection and deadlock handling   11 │   12 │ Workstream C (Parser):   13 │ - Implement full invocation parser with InvocationParser, InvocationValidator, and ORGAN_REGISTRY   14 │   15 │ Workstream A (FUSE01):   16 │ - Create complete FUSE01 protocol specification with activation conditions, modes, and rollback   17 │   18 │ Workstream D (Consumption Routes):   19 │ - Define CODE_FORGE output routing to consumers (SOUL_PATCHBAY, DREAM_COUNCIL, BLOOM_ENGINE, etc.)   20 │   21 │ Workstream G (Depth Limits):   22 │ - Implement recursion depth limits (7/12/21/33) across SOUL_PATCHBAY, ECHO_SHELL, BLOOM_ENGINE   23 │   24 │ Workstream F (Law Enforcement):   25 │ - Add LawEnforcer class with violation categories and consequence matrix to MYTHIC_SENATE   26 │   27 │ Workstream H (Supplementary):   28 │ - Add Friend-Node Consent Protocol to INTERLOCUTOR_PROTOCOLS   29 │ - Create System Recovery Protocol   30 │ - Create Collaborator Protocol   31 │ - Create External Bridges Interface (Obsidian, Git, Max/MSP integration)   32 │   33 │ New files (5):   34 │ - RE-GE_CONSTANTS_CHARGE_THRESHOLDS.md   35 │ - RE-GE_PROTOCOL_FUSE01.md   36 │ - RE-GE_PROTOCOL_SYSTEM_RECOVERY.md   37 │ - RE-GE_PROTOCOL_COLLABORATOR.md   38 │ - RE-GE_OS_INTERFACE_02_EXTERNAL_BRIDGES.md   39 │   40 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add README and ROADMAP documentation    2 │    3 │ README.md:    4 │ - Hero section: Problem, Approach, Outcome narrative    5 │ - Quick start guide with code examples    6 │ - CLI usage documentation    7 │ - Architecture overview with layer diagram    8 │ - Hard rules reference table    9 │ - RNG mapping table   10 │ - Full API reference (factory functions, matrix, modulation, rituals, FX, characters, patches)   11 │ - Development instructions   12 │ - Test coverage summary (297 tests across 8 suites)   13 │   14 │ ROADMAP.md:   15 │ - Current status: v1.0.0 with completed milestones   16 │ - Active development: Audio integration, browser persistence   17 │ - Future considerations: Visualization, extended rituals, network, AI   18 │ - Architecture principles for future development   19 │ - Contributing guidelines   20 │   21 │ Also fixes flaky character test:   22 │ - Adjusted sine wave sampling to avoid phase alignment   23 │ - Changed frequency from 10Hz to 1Hz, interval from 100ms to 50ms   24 │   25 │ All 297 tests pass.   26 │   27 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Update vitest to v4 to fix esbuild CORS vulnerability    2 │    3 │ Fixes GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99 (medium severity):    4 │ - esbuild <= 0.24.2 dev server allows any website to read responses    5 │ - Updated vitest 1.6.1 → 4.0.18    6 │ - Updated vite 5.4.21 → 7.3.1    7 │ - All esbuild instances now at 0.27.2 (patched)    8 │    9 │ All 297 tests pass.   10 │   11 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add comprehensive test coverage for spine and secondary systems    2 │    3 │ Test suite expansion from 75 to 297 tests:    4 │    5 │ Spine Module Tests (tests/spine.test.ts - 60 tests):    6 │ - Rule A: Genesis requirement, empty boot prevention    7 │ - Rule B: Append-only, event immutability, monotonic sequences    8 │ - Rule C: Context resolution, versioning, derivation    9 │ - Rule D: Non-identity transform enforcement   10 │ - Rule E: Cost vector emission and validation   11 │ - Rule F: World-binding, output→condition coupling, orphan detection   12 │ - EventLog: retrieval, chain traversal, replay, export/import   13 │ - ContextStore: queries, versioning, JSON serialization   14 │   15 │ Axiom Compliance Tests (tests/axiom-compliance.test.ts - 43 tests):   16 │ - All 10 axioms validated through architecture   17 │ - Closing condition: cannot be emptied, cannot repeat without mutation   18 │ - Kernel law: signal→matrix→transmutation→condition cycle   19 │ - validateAxiomCompliance() integration verification   20 │   21 │ Secondary System Tests:   22 │ - FX module (tests/fx.test.ts - 48 tests): units, registry, chains, presets   23 │ - Character module (tests/character.test.ts - 36 tests): waveforms, registry   24 │ - Patch module (tests/patch.test.ts - 35 tests): snapshots, validation   25 │   26 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Initial implementation: sēma-mētra--alchemica-mundi    2 │    3 │ Signal-Matrix for World-Alchemy - a modular synthesis patchbay    4 │ implementing axiom-compliant signal transformation architecture.    5 │    6 │ Core Architecture:    7 │ - 64 DUALCORE spectral dualities (-1.0 to +1.0)    8 │ - 32 binary gates (strict on/off logic)    9 │ - 15 hybrid toggles (context-sensitive states)   10 │ - 32 dual-binary bridges (2:1 mapping)   11 │   12 │ Event Spine (src/spine/):   13 │ - EventLog: append-only immutable event stream   14 │ - ContextStore: versioned context bundles   15 │ - TransformValidator: non-identity checks + cost vectors   16 │ - WorldBindingManager: mandatory feedback loop   17 │   18 │ Six Hard Rules Enforced:   19 │ - Rule A: No empty boot (genesis signal required)   20 │ - Rule B: Append-only (events immutable after commit)   21 │ - Rule C: Context required (all signals carry context)   22 │ - Rule D: Transform must mutate (identity rejected)   23 │ - Rule E: Every transform emits cost vector   24 │ - Rule F: Every output writes back (world-binding)   25 │   26 │ Additional Systems:   27 │ - LFO/RNG/Affector modulation engine   28 │ - Ritual execution with fusion signals   29 │ - FX chain with mythological god-names   30 │ - Character waveform models   31 │ - Patch save/load system   32 │ - CLI interface (sema)   33 │   34 │ Kernel Law: Signals generate the matrix; the matrix transmutes   35 │ signals; and every transmutation rewrites the conditions of the   36 │ world that will interpret the next signal.   37 │   38 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
